title: PickupBot
description: Automatically collects items and broken blocks directly into player inventory
body:
PickupBot: Revolutionize Your Mining Experience

What is PickupBot about?

PickupBot is a cutting-edge Minecraft plugin that automatically collects mined blocks, mob drops, and nearby items directly into your inventory. Say goodbye to the tedious process of walking over items to pick them up – with PickupBot, your items come to you!
Key Features

Automatic Item Collection: Items from broken blocks, slain mobs, and the surrounding area are instantly transferred to your inventory.

Customizable Collection Radius: Configure how far away PickupBot will collect items from (default: 5 blocks).

Selective Collection: Configure which types of items get collected automatically through comprehensive blacklists.

Player-Specific Settings: Each player can toggle the functionality on or off according to their preference.

Visual and Audio Feedback: Optional sound effects and particles when items are collected.

Smart Drop Prevention: Items that players intentionally drop aren't immediately picked back up.

Performance Optimized: Minimal server impact with configurable collection intervals.

Why Choose PickupBot?

For Players:

Efficiency: Mine continuously without stopping to collect items, dramatically increasing your mining efficiency.

Convenience: Never miss a rare drop again – items come directly to you.

Inventory Management: Spend less time managing your inventory during mining sessions.

Customizability: Toggle the feature on or off at will with simple commands.

For Server Owners:

Reduced Entity Load: Fewer item entities on the ground means better server performance.

Player Satisfaction: Offer a quality-of-life feature that players love.

Highly Configurable: Extensive options in the config file allow you to tailor the plugin to your server's needs.

Minimal Conflicts: Designed to work alongside other plugins with no issues.

What Sets PickupBot Apart?

While there are other collection plugins available, PickupBot stands out with its:

Player-Centric Design: Each player can decide whether to use the feature or not.

Performance Focus: Optimized code that won't slow down your server.

Smart Collection Logic: Intelligently handles item collection to prevent exploits.

Comprehensive Configuration: Fine-tune every aspect of the plugin's behavior.

Modern Codebase: Built for the latest Minecraft versions with forward compatibility in mind.

Commands

/pickup toggle - Toggle automatic collection on/off

/pickup on - Enable automatic collection

/pickup off - Disable automatic collection

/pickup status - Check your current settings

/pickup help - Display available commands

/pickup reload - Reload the configuration (admin only)

Permissions

pickupbot.use - Access to basic commands (default: true)

pickupbot.admin - Access to administrative commands (default: op)

Installation

Download the PickupBot.jar file

Place it in your server's plugins folder

Restart your server

Edit the config.yml file if you want to customize settings

Start collecting items automatically and revolutionize your mining experience today with PickupBot!
